source_month: "2024-02"
---

## Why It Works

The opening "Contrary to wishful thinking" is the hook — it's basically another way of saying "here comes a contrarian statement." Then, instead of making one, the template serves up a recognized truth. It's a bit of a trick, but one that works well by setting an expectation and then delivering something the reader already knows is true.

## Template

Contrary to wishful thinking, you don't get [POSITIVE THING] by [CONTRARIAN STATEMENT].
You get [POSITIVE THING] when you [WHAT ACTUALLY WORKS].

## Example

Contrary to wishful thinking, you don't get a great body by thinking about going to the gym.
You get a great body when you show up consistently and do the work.
